abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one esp-evse-surplus-manager can be configured.
abort.no_esp_evse_devices: No ESP EVSE devices with the expected entity set were found.

error.duplicate_charger_device: That ESPHome device is already configured.
error.device_inference_failed: The selected device does not expose the standard ESP EVSE entities this integration expects.

user.title: Site configuration
user.description: esp-evse-surplus-manager controls solar-surplus charging for chargers running the ESP EVSE firmware. It is not for the stock OpenEVSE firmware.

charger.title: Add ESP EVSE charger
charger.description: Configured chargers so far: {charger_count}. Only ESP EVSE devices are listed here. The integration will infer the connected sensor, measured current sensor, enable switch, and current/voltage numbers automatically. Priority uses rank order: lower numbers win. Priority 1 gets scarce power first and is the last one to be turned off, priority 2 comes next, and so on. To add more chargers later, use Reconfigure from the integration menu.

data.add_another_charger: Add another charger after this one

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure chargers
reconfigure.description: Add another ESP EVSE charger or change the priority of one that is already configured.

edit_charger.title: Select charger
edit_charger.description: Choose which configured ESP EVSE charger you want to edit.

edit_priority.title: Edit charger priority
edit_priority.description: Update the priority rank for {name}. Lower numbers are served first.

data.add_another_charger: Edit another charger after this one
